options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: encounter_shuffle
options.description: Should the order of encounters within the campaign be randomized?

options.name: shuffle_difficulty
options.description:
How shuffled should we make the encounters:
Difficult: No restrictions (you can fight the final boss in encounter 1)
Balanced: Encounters can show up at most one level before they would normally be encountered (Default).
Simple: Encounters are only shuffled with encounters of the same level

options.name: include_free_encounters
options.description:
When encounters are shuffled, should we include the Free Encounters in the selection?
TODO: not implemented in client yet, so its hidden.

options.name: loot_shuffle
options.description: Should the encounter rewards (potions, scrolls, etc) be shuffled?

options.name: loot_randomizer
options.description:
Should the encounter rewards (scrolls, runestones, weapons, etc) be randomized?
TODO: implement this in the client

options.name: potency_runes
options.description: EXPERIMENTAL: If enabled, archipelago will drop fundamental runestones in the encounter loot instead of automatically giving item bonuses.

options.name: campaign
options.description:
Select which campaign(s) you want to play.
If you include DLC, you must own that dlc or the campaign will not generate.

options.name: deathlink
options.description: If enabled, losing an encounter will kill all other deathlink players, and other players can cause you to wipe.

options.name: rng_seed
options.description: An arbitraty piece of text to use as a seed for the randomization. (Leave blank to use a random seed)

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
